pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 20-23: creates users with country='CA'
setup_task.sh lines 21-23 creates these three users with country='CA'; verifier.py line 30 loads from metadata; export_result.sh line 17 queries these usernames
setup_task.sh lines 24-26 creates james.johnson (US), emma.williams (US), charlie.brown (GB); verifier.py line 31 loads from metadata; export_result.sh line 17 queries these usernames

privileged_info_summary: The task targets three Canadian users (liam.smith, olivia.tremblay, noah.gauthier) for forced password reset using country code CA. Three control users (james.johnson from US, emma.williams from US, charlie.brown from GB) must not be affected. All data is synthetic, created by the setup script using Moodle's PHP API with hardcoded user information. The verifier checks that Canadian users have auth_forcepasswordchange set to 1 and non-Canadian users have it set to 0.
